explanation: The user asks for another slice of bread. Currently, there is a bread object on the dining table and a knife available on the dining table. To fulfill the request, I need to first pick up the knife to slice the bread. I will then go to the bread and slice it, creating a new slice of bread (tomatosliced_0 or breadsliced_X) which can be used as requested. The slicing action requires the knife to be held, and the bread must be accessible. Since the bread is on the dining table, I navigate there and perform the slice.
